channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Northwestern golfers invited to Augusta National Women's Amateur
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. - Northwestern is going to be well-represented at the 6th Annual Augusta National Women's Amateur Championship. Lauryn Nguyen and Elise Lee are set to the make the trip to Georgia along with NU commit Arianna Lau. "It's such a special place," noted Nguyen.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Bregman's $120 million, 3-year deal with Red Sox includes $60 million deferred, paid from 2035-46
item.description: Alex Bregman could receive the final payment of his $120 million, three-year deal with the Boston Red Sox in 2046. His deal, announced Saturday, calls for the $5 million signing bonus to be paid on Jan. 15, 2028, according to contract details obtained by The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College student wins $100K after beating NBA All-Star in 3-point contest
item.description: College student Jaren Barajas, 18, hit the shot of his life on Sunday night at the 2025 NBA All-Star Game, as he beat Damian Lillard and won $100,000.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles player declines actor’s offer to pay Super Bowl fine
item.description: Actor and Eagles fan Rob McElhenny, best known for co-creating and starring in FXX’s “It’s Always Sunny in Philadelphia,” had recently offered to foot the bill for a fine incurred by Eagles player Jalyx Hunt during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: Auburn stays at No. 1 in AP Top 25 for 6th straight week, Florida up to No. 2; Louisville returns
item.description: Auburn's win at Alabama assured the Tigers would keep the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press Top 25 men's college basketball poll for a sixth consecutive week.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The All-Star break is almost over. It's time for the stretch run toward the NBA playoffs
item.description: The trade deadline is gone. The All-Star break is about to end. Luka Doncic is with the Los Angeles Lakers.Jimmy Butler is with the Golden State Warriors. Anthony Davis is with the Dallas Mavericks, though it's unknown when he'll play again. The dust has settled. It's time for the stretch run.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dion Jordan, former highly touted NFL prospect, owns up to failed success at pro level
item.description: Former top draft pick Dion Jordan spoke out about his struggles in his NFL career and his failing to mature as a player when he was with the Miami Dolphins.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Warriors' Draymond Green draws backlash from NBA greats over remarks about All-Star Game, 'boring' games
item.description: Golden State Warriors star Draymond Green drew pushback from NBA greats over comments he made about the All-Star Game and the state of the league.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US hockey star Charlie McAvoy receives praise for big hit on Canada's Connor McDavid in intense 4 Nations game
item.description: U.S. hockey players praised Charlie McAvoy for setting the tone in their win over Canada with hit on Connor McDavid. The U.S. won the electric game, 3-1.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James takes heat for late decision to skip NBA All-Star Game
item.description: Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James drew some blowback on Sunday night as he announced he would not participate in the All-Star Game 90 minutes before gametime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The All-Star verdicts are in, and the player reaction to the mini-tournament is mixed
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The verdicts were mixed, as would be expected. The NBA's All-Star Game mini-tournament is now complete, Shaq's OGs getting the win in the four-team, three-game event where the first squad to score 40 points in each game got the victory. Some players liked it. Some didn't.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Shaq's OGs win the 1st NBA All-Star mini-tournament, topping Chuck's Global Stars 41-25 in the final
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The winning total last year: 211 points. The winning total this year: 41 points. An All-Star Game like none other — since it was three games, not one — still had plenty of flash and not a lot of fire.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: LeBron James sits out All-Star Game, ending 20-year streak of starts
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — LeBron James wanted to play in yet another All-Star Game. His left foot and ankle didn't let him. The NBA's career scoring leader announced about 90 minutes before the start of the competition on Sunday that he couldn't play, citing ongoing injury issues.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: DAYTONA, Fla. (WGHP) — The field of 41 racers has officially been set for Sunday's Daytona 500. This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway in Daytona Beach, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WGN 9

item.title: Fraser Bullock, Brad Wilson, Steve Starks to lead organizing committee for 2034 Olympic Games
item.description: State and Olympic officials named a 25-person organizing committee, led by Committee President Fraser Bullock, former House Speaker Brad Wilson, and Utah business executive Steve Starks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Padres release 2025 spring broadcast schedule
item.description: The San Diego Padres unveiled their 2025 spring broadcast schedule Thursday, stirring excitement for the approaching season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: CMU Swimming continues dominance at RMAC Championships
item.description: The Mesa Mavericks are gearing up for Nationals next month, putting their talent on full display at the RMAC Championships
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: CMU Men's Wrestling "Battle in Brownson" recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) —Western Colorado Tops Colorado Mesa in ‘Battle in Brownson’ In a heated rivalry matchup inside Brownson Arena, the Colorado Mesa Mavericks faced off against the Western Colorado Mountaineers in the annual Battle in Brownson.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Measure for county to back ban on trans women in sports fails
item.description: An effort to get San Diego County to throw its support behind a bill in Congress that would ban transgender girls and women from competing in women's sports failed when it was brought forward at the Board of Supervisors on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Padres sign Kyle Hart, left-hander with standout season in Korea
item.description: The San Diego Padres have agreed to a one-year contract with left-hander Kyle Hart out of Korea, according to an announcement by Major League Baseball Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Oakland high school gym named after NBA legend, alumnus Bill Russell set to open
item.description: (KRON/BCN) -- The Oakland Unified School District will hold a ribbon-cutting ceremony on Wednesday for a new school gymnasium at McClymonds High School named after late NBA legend Bill Russell, who was an alumnus of the school. The ceremony will take place at 3:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: It's a busy week in Colorado Mesa Maverick country
item.description:
Men’s Basketball. Women’s Basketball. Men’s Wrestling. Baseball. Softball. Swimming. Men’s Lacrosse. Women’s Lacrosse.
All eight of those teams are in action this week.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
